article_title: Bylaw 14758 — Housing Agreement (7786 and 7792 6th St) Bylaw 2025

briefs.title: Burnaby locks in 174 non-market rental units at 6th Street under permanent housing agreement
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council adopted Bylaw 14758, authorizing a housing agreement with Metro Vancouver Housing Corporation to keep 174 rental units at 7786–7792 6th Street permanently affordable for low- and moderate-income tenants.
briefs.industries: Construction & Development, Landlord & Property Mgmt, Tenant
